Subject: EUR settlement — Bordeaux Wines INV-2026-0577 — processed
Date:    Wednesday, 06 May 2026 14:18 +03:00

Treasury,

Confirming the SWIFT EUR transfer of EUR 89,400.00 to Bordeaux Wines &
Spirits SARL (Vendor V-2310, IBAN FR7630006000011234567890189) was
released from our Emirates NBD EUR account this morning, value date today.

Invoice reference INV-2026-0577 — French wine shipment for the Q2 hospitality
channel orders. The settlement rate Emirates NBD applied this morning was
4.2100 SAR/EUR (their published spot at 09:45 AST). SAR equivalent of
SAR 376,374.00 has been booked.

The supplier has acknowledged receipt by email and will release the next
shipment from Marseille on Monday.

For the books:
  Dr  5010  COGS – Beverages          376,374.00
  Cr  1030  Cash – Emirates NBD EUR  (EUR 89,400.00 @ 4.2100)

Best,

Layla Al-Otaibi
